title: Euractiv’s 2026 Health Policy Conference [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: This video highlights key moments from Euractiv’s 2026 Health Policy Conference, bringing together policymakers, industry representatives and stakeholders to discuss the state of Europe’s health system. Speakers reflect on Europe’s strengths, including broad access to innovative therapies, while pointing to growing pressures from ageing populations, limited public budgets and rising chronic disease. The discussion covers […]
